title: Cross-schema query builder with reusable joins
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.PostQueries` with composable builders. `base/0` returns `from(p in Post, as: :post)`. `with_author_active/1` joins author `as: :author` + filters active. `with_published_category/1` joins category `as: :category` + filters on publishable categories. `ordered/1` orders by inserted_at desc. Then write `MyApp.Blog.feed/0` that composes `base |> with_author_active |> with_published_category |> ordered |> Repo.all`. All composers must accept a queryable and return a queryable. Named bindings must work across composer boundaries. Write to `lib/my_app/blog/post_queries.ex` and `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Full composable pattern across multiple schemas with proper named bindings at every level. Final exam for the foundation dimension.
